summary: Added mergePositions(uint256[] calldata positionIds) to LPVault.sol: operator-gated function that combines same-owner same-range positions into a survivor, rolling up liquidity and uncollected fees. Also updated collect() and emergencyCancelAll() to include tokensOwed in their payout computation (backward-compatible — tokensOwed was always 0 before merge). 14 integration tests covering happy path, range mismatch revert, insufficient input revert, fee accounting preservation with collect verification, and operator-only access control.
